response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with the role. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of production GenAI delivery at scale, RAG/vector database work, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), Python depth, or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) architecture for AI systems. Customer-facing technical-leadership and discovery experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Recent MCP and agentic workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
10+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node, with AWS CDK exposure at Optilyz
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, public talks)
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Python is not in the skills list; role requires 8+ years of AI-driven development in Python or TypeScript
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery/consulting at staff level on enterprise GenAI engagements

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
No demonstrated Python or major-cloud AI architecture depth
